platform: Feed / Pet Food / Food Manufacturing Platform Blueprint

capabilities.name: Customer & Sales Collaboration (Portal/Hub)
capabilities.description: Self-service experiences for customers and internal teams: order entry/status, documents (COA/specs/labels), service interactions, shared visibility into deliveries and invoices.

sub_capabilities.name: Customer Order Self-Service
sub_capabilities.description: Create, modify, track orders; delivery dates; backorder visibility; notifications.

sub_capabilities.name: Document & Certificate Center
sub_capabilities.description: Access/download COAs, specs, labels, invoices, delivery notes; customer-specific document views.

sub_capabilities.name: Customer-Specific Product Catalog & Specs
sub_capabilities.description: Customer-specific assortment, pricing, pack formats, spec agreements and controlled visibility.

sub_capabilities.name: Service & Case Management (Lite)
sub_capabilities.description: Requests, complaints, returns; triage and handoff to quality workflows.

capabilities.name: Supplier Collaboration (Vendor Portal)
capabilities.description: Supplier-facing workflows: specs exchange, document collection, shipment/lot visibility, performance feedback and dispute handling.

sub_capabilities.name: Supplier Onboarding & Qualification
sub_capabilities.description: Qualification steps, approvals, required documents, approved material lists, risk level.

sub_capabilities.name: Spec Exchange & Change Notifications
sub_capabilities.description: Structured spec uploads, versioning, change alerts and approvals.

sub_capabilities.name: Supplier Documents (SDS/COA) Intake
sub_capabilities.description: Collect SDS/COA, validate completeness, route to QC/compliance, maintain traceable history.

sub_capabilities.name: Supplier Performance & Scorecards
sub_capabilities.description: OTIF, defect rates, nonconformities, responsiveness and trend views.

capabilities.name: Formulation & Specification Engine
capabilities.description: Core product intelligence: ingredient and nutrient model, rules/constraints, least-cost optimization, versioning/approvals, spec management, reformulation and scenarios.

sub_capabilities.name: Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model
sub_capabilities.description: Ingredients, nutrients, digestibility/energy systems, UoM conversions, derived values, metadata.

sub_capabilities.name: Constraints, Rules & Business Logic
sub_capabilities.description: Min/max bounds, ratios, additive rules, ingredient bans, customer constraints, plant constraints.

sub_capabilities.name: Least-Cost Optimization Solver
sub_capabilities.description: Optimization engine with objectives (cost, margin, sustainability), multiple constraints, penalties.

sub_capabilities.name: Recipe Lifecycle & Governance
sub_capabilities.description: Versioning, approvals, effective dates, audit trail, change rationale, role-based permissions.

sub_capabilities.name: Spec Management (Product & Material)
sub_capabilities.description: Material specs, finished product specs, tolerances, test requirements, customer spec variants.

sub_capabilities.name: Reformulation & Scenario Simulation
sub_capabilities.description: What-if comparisons, ingredient substitution, price sensitivity, constraint stress tests.

capabilities.name: ERP & Commercial Backbone
capabilities.description: Run-the-business: procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, inventory, finance posting, costing, pricing, invoicing, multi-site operations.

sub_capabilities.name: Procure-to-Pay
sub_capabilities.description: Requisitions, purchase orders, receipts, invoice matching, approvals and vendor management.

sub_capabilities.name: Order-to-Cash
sub_capabilities.description: Quotes, sales orders, pricing, allocations, delivery, invoicing and credit workflows.

sub_capabilities.name: Inventory, Warehousing & Silos
sub_capabilities.description: Lot/batch inventory, locations, silo management, transfers, shrinkage, stock policies.

sub_capabilities.name: Costing & Margin Accounting
sub_capabilities.description: Standard/actual costing, cost rollups, variance analysis, margin reporting, by-product handling.

sub_capabilities.name: Finance & Controls
sub_capabilities.description: GL/AP/AR, tax, audit controls, period close, multi-entity consolidation support (as needed).

sub_capabilities.name: Pricing & Contract Management
sub_capabilities.description: Customer price lists, formulas, rebates; supplier contracts; link to market indices.

capabilities.name: Planning & Supply Chain (MRP/APS)
capabilities.description: Translate demand + constraints into feasible plans: forecasting, MRP, capacity, availability checks, what-if scenarios, production scheduling.

sub_capabilities.name: Demand Planning & Forecasting
sub_capabilities.description: Forecast generation, seasonality, promotions, forecast error tracking and scenario planning.

sub_capabilities.name: Material Requirements Planning (MRP)
sub_capabilities.description: Net requirements, safety stock, lead times, reorder policies, planned orders.

sub_capabilities.name: Capacity Planning
sub_capabilities.description: Rough-cut and detailed capacity checks, constraints by line, shift calendars, bottlenecks.

sub_capabilities.name: Production Scheduling
sub_capabilities.description: Sequence optimization, campaign planning, changeover constraints, due-date adherence.

sub_capabilities.name: Supply Risk & What-if Scenarios
sub_capabilities.description: Material shortages, substitutions, alternate sourcing, service level impacts.

capabilities.name: Manufacturing Execution (MES-lite / Production Execution)
capabilities.description: Connect plan to execution: batching/dosing, run sheets, actual consumption, yields, deviations, genealogy and reconciliation to inventory/costing.

sub_capabilities.name: Batching & Dosing Instructions
sub_capabilities.description: Generate execution instructions from approved recipes; enforce tolerances and sequencing.

sub_capabilities.name: Shop-floor Data Capture
sub_capabilities.description: Capture actual weights/consumption, cycle times, downtime reasons and operator inputs.

sub_capabilities.name: Yield, Loss & Reconciliation
sub_capabilities.description: Track yields, losses, rework; reconcile back to inventory and costing.

sub_capabilities.name: Deviations & Exceptions Management
sub_capabilities.description: Detect and record deviations from target recipe/plan; route to quality and approvals.

sub_capabilities.name: Batch Genealogy & Traceability Links
sub_capabilities.description: Maintain batch-to-lot genealogy; connect materials to finished goods for recall readiness.

capabilities.name: Quality & Laboratory (LIMS / QC)
capabilities.description: Quality control: sampling, instrument integration, results, COA, holds/releases, nonconformities and audit evidence.

sub_capabilities.name: Sampling Plans & Test Requirements
sub_capabilities.description: Define sampling frequency, methods, tests per material/product/customer and risk level.

sub_capabilities.name: Lab Instrument & External Lab Integration
sub_capabilities.description: Automated intake of test results from instruments/LIS and external labs, with validation.

sub_capabilities.name: Results Management & SPC
sub_capabilities.description: Result capture, limits, trend analysis, statistical process control, alerts.

sub_capabilities.name: Hold/Release & Disposition
sub_capabilities.description: Workflow for holds, re-tests, release decisions, quarantines, and rework instructions.

sub_capabilities.name: Nonconformities & CAPA
sub_capabilities.description: Deviations, complaints linkage, root cause analysis, corrective/preventive actions.

sub_capabilities.name: COA & Quality Documentation
sub_capabilities.description: Certificate of Analysis generation, attachments, customer templates and controlled distribution.

capabilities.name: Compliance & Labeling Intelligence
capabilities.description: Regulatory and documentation: labels, claims validation, export rules, allergen/ingredient statements and audit trails.

sub_capabilities.name: Label Composition & Declarations
sub_capabilities.description: Generate ingredient declarations, nutritional panels (as applicable), additives, and required statements.

sub_capabilities.name: Claims & Rules Validation
sub_capabilities.description: Validate label claims against formulation, tolerances, legal thresholds and customer promises.

sub_capabilities.name: Market/Export Compliance Packs
sub_capabilities.description: Country/market specific requirements, language variants, document bundles for shipments.

sub_capabilities.name: Audit Trail & Evidence Management
sub_capabilities.description: Traceable record of spec/label changes, approvals, linked lab evidence, and distribution logs.

capabilities.name: Analytics, BI & AI Insights Layer
capabilities.description: Cross-domain intelligence: KPI dashboards, cost/margin drivers, QA trends, forecast accuracy, anomaly detection, predictive models and scenario engines.

sub_capabilities.name: Unified KPI Dashboards
sub_capabilities.description: Role-based dashboards for exec, nutrition, QA, procurement and operations.

sub_capabilities.name: Cost & Margin Drivers Analytics
sub_capabilities.description: Material cost impact, formulation cost deltas, yield variances, customer profitability.

sub_capabilities.name: Quality Analytics & Trend Detection
sub_capabilities.description: Spec drift, supplier defect trends, SPC alerts, complaint correlations.

sub_capabilities.name: Forecast & Service Level Analytics
sub_capabilities.description: Forecast error, fill rate, OTIF, schedule adherence and root-cause analysis.

sub_capabilities.name: Scenario Engine (What-if Workspace)
sub_capabilities.description: Compare scenarios across price, supply, specs and capacity; store and share assumptions.

sub_capabilities.name: AI Models & Decision Support
sub_capabilities.description: Recommendations (substitutions, risk flags), anomaly detection, predictive quality or yield.

capabilities.name: Integration & API Fabric (EDI/Events/Connectors)
capabilities.description: Connectivity: APIs, events, EDI, file interfaces, connectors to markets, banks, labs, MES/SCADA and partner platforms.

sub_capabilities.name: API Gateway & Service Interfaces
sub_capabilities.description: REST/GraphQL endpoints, auth, throttling, versioning, developer access controls.

sub_capabilities.name: Event Streaming & Messaging
sub_capabilities.description: Publish/subscribe for changes (prices, specs, batches, lab results), async workflows.

sub_capabilities.name: EDI & Partner Connectivity
sub_capabilities.description: Orders, ASNs, invoices, shipment status; standardized mappings and monitoring.

sub_capabilities.name: Connectors (MES/SCADA/Lab/Market Feeds)
sub_capabilities.description: Prebuilt adapters for plant systems, lab systems, commodity/price feeds and sensors.

sub_capabilities.name: Integration Monitoring & Replay
sub_capabilities.description: Health checks, dead-letter handling, retries, reconciliation reports and replay tooling.

capabilities.name: Master Data Management (MDM)
capabilities.description: Single source of truth for core entities: ingredients, nutrients, specs, suppliers, customers, sites, units and identifiers with governance.

sub_capabilities.name: Reference Data & Units Management
sub_capabilities.description: Units of measure, conversions, calendars, codesets, naming standards, multilingual labels.

sub_capabilities.name: Entity Lifecycle & Stewardship
sub_capabilities.description: Create/approve/change workflows for ingredients, suppliers, customers, specs, sites.

sub_capabilities.name: Data Quality Rules & Validation
sub_capabilities.description: Completeness checks, duplicate detection, validation rules and exception queues.

sub_capabilities.name: Master Data Synchronization
sub_capabilities.description: Sync master data to/from ERP, MES, LIMS, portals via APIs/events with mapping.

capabilities.name: Security, Roles & Governance
capabilities.description: Identity and access control, segregation of duties, audit logging, recipe/IP protection and governance policies.

sub_capabilities.name: Identity, SSO & MFA
sub_capabilities.description: SAML/OIDC, SSO, MFA, password policies and identity lifecycle.

sub_capabilities.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
sub_capabilities.description: Fine-grained permissions by site/product/customer; least privilege and role templates.

sub_capabilities.name: Segregation of Duties (SoD) & Approvals
sub_capabilities.description: Enforce SoD, approval chains for recipes, purchases, releases, and compliance changes.

sub_capabilities.name: Audit Logging & Compliance Reporting
sub_capabilities.description: Immutable logs, access reports, change histories, evidence exports for audits.

sub_capabilities.name: Data Governance Policies
sub_capabilities.description: Retention, classification, access reviews, privacy controls and governance workflows.

capabilities.name: Deployment, DevOps & Observability
capabilities.description: Cloud/on-prem delivery, environments, releases, monitoring, telemetry, backup/DR, scalability controls.

sub_capabilities.name: Deployment Models (Cloud/On-Prem/Hybrid)
sub_capabilities.description: Standardized packaging and provisioning across deployment types and multi-site setups.

sub_capabilities.name: CI/CD & Release Management
sub_capabilities.description: Pipelines, versioning, feature flags, rollback strategies and change management.

sub_capabilities.name: Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing)
sub_capabilities.description: Centralized monitoring, alerting, SLOs, performance monitoring and root-cause tooling.

sub_capabilities.name: Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA
sub_capabilities.description: Backups, restore testing, RPO/RTO targets, high availability patterns.

sub_capabilities.name: Data Platform Foundations
sub_capabilities.description: Operational data stores, analytics warehouse/lake hooks, retention and data pipelines.
